rewritten_requirements: The system shall allow a user to log in by entering their username and password.
The system shall allow the user to try again if the login details are incorrect until successful login.
The system shall allow the user to choose between requesting an FIR, requesting a petition, or viewing the list of wanted and missing persons after login.
The system shall display the requested information once the user selects an option.
The system shall allow a police user to log in by entering their username and password.
The system shall allow the police user to try again if the login details are incorrect until successful login.
The system shall allow the police user to view the list of wanted and missing persons or perform major activities such as adding station details and crime records after login.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system allows a user to log in by entering their username and password.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A user starts by entering their username and password.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the login details are incorrect, the user can try again until they successfully log in.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the details are incorrect, they try again until they are able to log in.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After logging in, the user can choose between requesting an FIR, requesting a petition, or viewing the list of wanted and missing persons.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After logging in, the user can choose what they want to access. They may request an FIR, request a petition, or view the list of wanted and missing persons.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The system displays the requested information once the user selects an option.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once they choose an option, the requested information is shown

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A police user logs in by entering their username and password.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A police user also logs in by entering their username and password.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the login details are incorrect, the police user can try again until they successfully log in.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If the details are incorrect, they keep trying until they can log in.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After logging in, the police user can view the list of wanted and missing persons or perform major activities such as adding station details and crime records.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After logging in, the police user can either view the list of wanted and missing persons or perform major activities such as adding station details and crime records.
